visual_elements.text: Assess Your Strengths Take time to identify your unique skills, experiences, and passions that can contribute to public health leadership.

visual_elements.text: Build Your Knowledge Utilize the resources mentioned to enhance your understanding of entrepreneurship and innovation in public health.

visual_elements.text: Connect with Mentors Seek guidance from established leaders in the field who can provide insights and support your growth.

visual_elements.text: Develop an Action Plan Create a concrete strategy for how you'll apply your leadership skills to make a meaningful impact in public health.
visual_elements.role_tier_reason: Readable section heading and supporting instruction text.

visual_elements.text: Remember, the journey to becoming an effective public health leader is ongoing. Continue to refine your skills, stay informed about emerging challenges, and remain committed to making a positive difference in the health and wellbeing of communities.

perception_artifact.extracted_text: Next Steps: Your Path Forward Assess Your Strengths Take time to identify your unique skills, experiences, and passions that can contribute to public health leadership. Build Your Knowledge Utilize the resources mentioned to enhance your understanding of entrepreneurship and innovation in public health. Connect with Mentors Seek guidance from established leaders in the field who can provide insights and support your growth. Develop an Action Plan Create a concrete strategy for how you'll apply your leadership skills to make a meaningful impact in public health. Remember, the journey to becoming an effective public health leader is ongoing. Continue to refine your skills, stay informed about emerging challenges, and remain committed to making a positive difference in the health and wellbeing of communities. We look forward to seeing your contributions at the upcoming HII Meeting on October 28th and beyond!
perception_artifact.layout_description: A large dark-blue title sits at the upper left on a white background. Four next-step blocks are arranged in a two-column grid with small circular icons and pale horizontal divider lines above each block, followed by two closing text paragraphs across the bottom.
text_blocks: Assess Your Strengths Take time to identify your unique skills, experiences, and passions that can contribute to public health leadership.
Build Your Knowledge Utilize the resources mentioned to enhance your understanding of entrepreneurship and innovation in public health.
Connect with Mentors Seek guidance from established leaders in the field who can provide insights and support your growth.
Develop an Action Plan Create a concrete strategy for how you'll apply your leadership skills to make a meaningful impact in public health.

Remember, the journey to becoming an effective public health leader is ongoing. Continue to refine your skills, stay informed about emerging challenges, and remain committed to making a positive difference in the health and wellbeing of communities.
We look forward to seeing your contributions at the upcoming HII Meeting on October 28th and beyond!
